data.scene: User enables location sensors; the app periodically collects device location in the background.
data.purpose: Implement presence detection, geofencing automation, and location history tracking.
data.item: Precise GPS location (latitude, longitude, accuracy, speed, bearing)
data.frequency: Every 5-60 seconds (depends on configured background location interval)
data.storage: Local Room database storage + server-side storage
data.thirdparty: No third-party data sharing; data sent to the user's self-hosted Home Assistant server
data.switchpath: Settings -> Sensor Management -> Location Sensors -> Enable/Disable

data.scene: The geocoded location sensor is enabled; GPS coordinates are reverse-geocoded into a human-readable address via Android Geocoder API.
data.purpose: Provide a human-readable street address sensor in Home Assistant for location-aware automations and dashboards.
data.source: Android Geocoder API (uses GPS coordinates from FusedLocationProviderClient)
data.item: Street address, city, administrative area, country, phone number, URL, plus underlying GPS coordinates
data.frequency: Periodic (triggered on each location sensor update cycle)
data.thirdparty: Android Geocoder API may use network services for reverse geocoding; resolved address data is sent only to the user's self-hosted Home Assistant server
data.switchpath: Settings -> Sensor Management -> Geocoded Location Sensor -> Enable/Disable

data.scene: High-accuracy mode is enabled by the user setting, a server command, or a geofence enter/exit event; a foreground service collects continuous GPS updates.
data.purpose: Provide precise continuous location tracking for accurate presence detection and geofence transition monitoring.
data.item: Precise GPS location (latitude, longitude, accuracy, speed, bearing) at high frequency
data.frequency: Continuous (every 1-5 seconds) while high-accuracy mode is active
data.thirdparty: No third-party data sharing; data sent to the user's self-hosted Home Assistant server
data.switchpath: Settings -> Sensor Management -> Location Sensors -> High Accuracy Mode -> Enable/Disable

permissions.name: ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION
permissions.scene: When enabling location sensors or during onboarding location request
permissions.purpose: Obtain precise GPS location for presence detection and geofencing
permissions.impact: If denied, location sensors will not work; location-based automations will be unavailable

permissions.name: ACCESS_BACKGROUND_LOCATION
permissions.purpose: Allow location updates when the app is in the background
permissions.impact: If denied, location cannot be updated when the app is running in the background
